name: ara-handoff
description: Create, monitor, and steer bounded Ara cloud coding sessions from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Hand bounded coding work to Ara.
interface.longDescription: Uses Ara's workspace-scoped OAuth MCP connection to create, monitor, and steer cloud coding sessions.
defaultPrompt: Hand this bounded coding task to Ara and monitor it.
Show the status of my Ara coding sessions.
